title: impatiens pseudoperezii subsp. pseudoperezii
intro: Impatiens pseudoperezii subsp. pseudoperezii, also known as the Peruvian balsam or balsamo de Perú, is a plant species belonging to the balsam family (Impatiens spp.). It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to the presence of a resinous sap that contains benzoic acid and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the sap of Impatiens pseudoperezii subsp. pseudoperezii is often used as a cough syrup or expectorant, and can be found in various traditional remedies and herbal products.
